creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
In config.log, it says :

configure:6074: cc -g -O2   conftest.c -lkrb5 -lgssapi -L/usr/local/lib >&5
ld: error: unable to find library -lkrb5
ld: error: unable to find library -lgssapi
cc: error: linker command failed with exit code 1 (use -v to see invocation)
configure:6078: $? = 1 

So, well, you probably need to figure out if you really need those, and if they are where they should be.
